events.title: US launches new wave of strikes against Iran
events.desc: The US military announced a fresh wave of strikes against Iran on Sunday, aiming to "continue degrading" Tehran's ability to attack commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz. These attacks follow three previous days of tit-for-tat exchanges between the US and Iran as a June ceasefire deal frays.

events.title: US bombs Iranian cities again as Hormuz standoff intensifies
events.desc: Iranian state media reported explosions in the port cities of Bandar Abbas, Sirik, and Jask, as well as on Qeshm Island, amidst an escalating standoff in the Strait of Hormuz. This escalation follows renewed US strikes targeting Iran's ability to threaten shipping.

events.title: US launches more strikes on Iran as Strait of Hormuz standoff deepens
events.desc: The United States has launched a new wave of strikes on Iran, targeting Tehran's capacity to threaten shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This action is part of an ongoing exchange of fire between the two nations.

events.title: Israel releases video of huge detonations in Lebanon
events.desc: The Israeli military has released video footage depicting large explosions and detonations in villages located in southern Lebanon. This action is part of the ongoing conflict in the region.

events.title: Deadly Israeli strikes pound Gaza
events.desc: Israeli military forces have conducted strikes across multiple locations in the Gaza Strip, resulting in casualties. The full extent of the damage and casualties is being assessed.

events.title: Israeli attacks in Gaza kill six people, including a girl, medics say
events.desc: Palestinian health officials reported that Israeli attacks in the Gaza Strip on Sunday killed at least six people, including a 9-year-old girl. The Israeli military stated they were not aware of the specific incident.

events.title: Headteacher among four killed in deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since latest ceasefire
events.desc: Lebanese state media reported that a headteacher and three other individuals were killed in the deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since the latest ceasefire. The victims were travelling in a car after visiting family.

events.title: US and Iran trade strikes after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported hitting missile sites and command centers in Iran, while Iran stated it attacked US bases. This exchange of strikes follows attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Iran nuclear and military damage revealed after restricted satellite images released
events.desc: Restricted satellite imagery has revealed damage to Iranian nuclear and military infrastructure, including ballistic missile facilities, nuclear sites, and naval bases, following recent exchanges of strikes.

events.title: Bomb explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
events.desc: Reports indicate that bomb explosions injured 18 people in Damascus. State television confirmed that the Syrian president welcomed Macron at the presidential palace as the reports of the blasts emerged.

events.title: Hezbollah stronghold — South Beirut conflict analysis
events.desc: The ongoing conflict dynamics in Lebanon involve Hezbollah's operational areas, particularly in South Beirut. Recent agreements and escalations highlight the complex security situation in the region, affecting broader regional stability.

events.title: Houthi threat to maritime shipping remains a concern
events.desc: The Houthi threat to maritime shipping in the Red Sea and potentially the Strait of Hormuz continues to be a significant concern. Despite shifts in global attention, the underlying issues and the need for international responses persist.

events.title: Syrian transitional parliament holds first session
events.desc: Syria's transitional parliament convened for its first session, tasked with drafting a new constitution and establishing democratic foundations. This marks a political milestone following the toppling of Bashar al-Assad.

events.title: Iraqi prime minister to visit Washington; oil and gas deals expected
events.desc: Iraq's prime minister is scheduled to visit Washington to bolster strategic ties, with the signing of oil and gas deals anticipated. This visit occurs amidst ongoing military escalations between the US and Iran, prompting Iraq to balance its relationships.
